project_identity.name: Orient Global Dining & Games Command Center
project_identity.aesthetic_profile: Cinematic / Glassmorphism / Dark Mode / High-Performance UI
project_identity.target_platform: Full-Stack React + Node.js (Express) + WebSocket for real-time approvals

permissions: Draft promotional banners for both divisions
admin_staff.constraints: Cannot publish price changes, hero content, or critical system settings without HOD approval.

permissions: Final authority on Menu pricing and Sommelier selections
Override authority for all live content
admin_hod.approval_logic: Must provide a 'Reason for Declination' if a proposal is rejected, visible to the proposing staff member.

ai_builder_master_prompt:
Build a high-performance, dual-role administrative dashboard for 'Orient Global Dining' and 'Orient Global Games'. The UI must feature a 'Cinematic Glassmorphism' aesthetic (deep black backgrounds, vibrant neon accents, 30px blur, 1px white/5 borders).

### MODULE 1: THE DINING COMMAND (HOD ONLY)
- A real-time 'Menu Approval Queue' for new dishes and price adjustments.
- A 'Sommelier Dashboard' to update wine selections and pairing notes.
- Action buttons: [Approve & Sync to Site] and [Decline with Reason].

### MODULE 2: THE ARENA COMMAND (HOD ONLY)
- A 'Tournament Sanctioning' view where HOD reviews prize pools and schedules before they go live.
- A 'Hardware Health' monitor showing the status of all gaming pods and rigs.

### MODULE 3: OPERATIONAL INPUT (STAFF & HOD)
- A 'Menu Editor' for the Restaurant with drag-and-drop categorization.
- A 'Tournament Draft' tool for Games staff to propose new events.
- A 'Hardware Status' toggle for immediate maintenance flagging (Bypasses approval).

### MODULE 4: RESERVATIONS & LOGISTICS
- A calendar-based view for Restaurant reservations and Gaming pod bookings.
- A 'Delivery Toggle' to instantly enable/disable online ordering based on kitchen capacity.

### TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- React frontend with Tailwind CSS.
- Use 'Framer Motion' for smooth layout transitions between 'Dining' and 'Games' tabs.
- Implement a 'Live Preview' window that renders the actual site components with the proposed data.
- The 'admin_staff' view must show a clear timeline of their proposals and HOD feedback.
